name: io.github.listingbureau/listingbureau-mcp
title: Listing Bureau - Amazon Organic Ranking MCP Server
description: The only ranking-focused Amazon MCP server. Run organic ranking campaigns, track keyword positions, and monitor rank movement from Claude, Cursor, or any AI assistant. 21 tools across projects, scheduling, cost estimation, wallet, orders, and account management.

environmentVariables.name: LB_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Listing Bureau API key. Create an account at listingbureau.com to get one.
